$meta.dyn_note: dyn = description template with {formula} holes (STR/AGL/PRC/VIT/WIL), from each ability's wiki page 'Show formulas' view (0.9.4.14). Rendered with current attributes; base = all attributes 10.
$meta.desc_note: Spears descriptions are VERBATIM wiki text (0.9.1.19 tree page / 0.9.4.14 formula pages); \n\n = paragraph breaks. Other trees still abbreviated — re-extract verbatim on demand.

skills.desc: Grants spear strikes against targets affected by Immobilization or "Net" +10% Armor Penetration and +15% Bodypart Damage.
Leg strike +5% Crit Chance. Adjacent: +25% WD, +50% Knockback. 1 tile away: +25% Bodypart Damage, +60% Immobilization.
skills.dyn:
Delivers a strike to one of the target's legs with +{0.5*AGL}% Crit Chance.

If the target is adjacent, grants the strike +{5+AGL+PRC}% Weapon Damage and +{30+STR+AGL}% Knockback Chance.

If the target is 1 tile away, grants the strike +{5+AGL+PRC}% Bodypart Damage and +{30+(1.5*STR)+(1.5*PRC)}% Immobilization Chance.

skills.desc: Strike 2x1 area: +20% Bodypart Damage, +20% Armor Pen, +50% Bleed. Vs Immobilized/Netted: -35% WD, -100% Immobilization, halved bonuses, instantly refreshes cooldown.
skills.dyn:
Delivers a strike to 2x1 tile area with +{2*PRC}% Bodypart Damage, +{2*AGL}% Armor Penetration, and +{30+(2*STR)}% Bleed Chance.

If the target is affected by Immobilization or "Net" grants the strike -35% Weapon Damage, -100% Immobilization Chance, halves all other bonuses, and instantly refreshes the skill's cooldown.

skills.desc:
Remaining on the same tile grants -3% Cooldowns Duration, +3% Weapon Damage and +3% Counter Chance for 4 turns.

The effect stacks up to 3 times.

Moving to other tiles removes the effect (except when moving with Maneuvers).

Activates "Pikeman Stance" for 10 turns:
+5% Accuracy
+5% Bleed Chance
+15% Knockback Chance
+8% Immobilization Chance

Using the ability tree's skills grants an extra stack of the effect (up to IV).

Remaining on the same tile prolongs the effect's duration by 1 turn (up to 10), and basic spear strikes reduce its number of stacks (no more than once per turn).

Only one Stance effect can be active at a time.
Critical spear strikes: +20% Bodypart Damage; bonus damage = 10% target Max Health (max 20).
skills.dyn:
Grants critical spear strikes +20% Bodypart Damage.

Critical spear strikes deal additional damage equal to 10% of the target's Max Health (but no more than {STR+AGL}).

skills.desc: 'Determination' 2 turns: free strike (+20% WD, +75% Bleed) vs every enemy moving adjacent; on damage +5% Max Energy, target -20% Move Res 3 turns.
skills.dyn:
Activates "Determination" for 2 turns:

Delivers a free strike with +{AGL+PRC}% Weapon Damage and +{55+(2*STR)}% Bleed Chance to every enemy that moves to adjacent tiles.

If this strike does damage, replenishes {-5+WIL}% Max Energy and applies the target with -20% Move Resistance for 3 turns.

skills.desc:
Grants +5% Weapon Damage, +5% Immobilization Chance, and +3% Crit Chance if there is only one adjacent enemy.

Doubles the bonuses if the adjacent tiles are empty.

Reposition; +20% Max Block Power refill; -1 turn tree cooldowns per visible enemy within 3 tiles. 'Regroup' 10 turns, per stack: +5% Block Chance, +5% Max Block Power, +15% BP Recovery, +5% Counter (stack per reduced cooldown, up to IV).
skills.dyn:
Repositions to an adjacent tile, replenishes {2*VIT}% Max Block Power, and reduces the cooldown of the ability tree's other skills by 1 turn for each visible enemy within 3 tiles.

Activates "Regroup" for 10 turns:
+5% Block Chance
+5% Max Block Power
+15% Block Power Recovery
+5% Counter Chance

Grants an extra stack of the effect (up to IV) for each reduced cooldown.

skills.desc:
When enemies move to adjacent tiles, applies them with -10% Piercing Resistance and -10% Crit Avoidance for 4 turn.

The effect stacks up to 2 times.

Grants spear strikes against adjacent targets +30% Knockback Chance.
